mapper.select: SELECT ID, POST_ID, USER_ID, CONTENT, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM COMMENTS WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENTS (POST_ID, USER_ID, CONTENT, REG_DT) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENTS SET CONTENT = #{content}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
